message:
feat(render): add generation tracking to GraphemePool for stale ID detection

Extend GraphemePool with per-slot generation counters that increment on
slot reuse. GraphemeId now encodes generation alongside slot index and
width, allowing get/retain/release/refcount to reject stale IDs from
previous allocations. Prevents use-after-free bugs when a slot is freed
and reallocated to a different grapheme. Includes a dedicated
stale_generation_returns_none test and updates all existing test call
sites to the new GraphemeId::new(slot, generation, width) signature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
